step_by_step_thinking: I agree with your assessment. Primordial cysts commonly originate from residual epithelium associated with failed tooth development, particularly in regions where teeth were supposed to erupt but did not. This makes option A correct because it directly addresses the scenario where these cysts can develop in places of missing teeth.
